creator: nick@kirby.cx
text:
Created attachment 252382
Patch to 26.0.0

Changelog: https://github.com/joke2k/faker/blob/refs/tags/v26.0.0/CHANGELOG.md

Update jumping several versions. Read through and nothing seems to have changed any major functionality.

Doing updating/new port work to port py-tavern. v25.1.0 is listed as the requirement, but given what py-Faker does I figured I might as well jump right to v26.0.0 while I'm here.
